kill_the_wither.title: Kill the Wither or Wither Reincarnated

subtitle.translate: The Wither is not the danger. The star it leaves behind is the beginning.

description: The Wither fight is a boss encounter.
It flies. It fires Wither skulls that cause the Wither status effect.
Milk removes Wither status. Golden apples help.
At half health, it gains damage immunity to projectiles.
Melee is required for the last half of the fight.
Wither Reincarnated enhances the vanilla Wither fight
The boss lock requires the Wither scroll before it can be damaged.
The Nether Star is the power source for Beacons.
It is also the trigger item for nuclear_age.
Hold it and the factory's next chapter begins.
The Wither Eye anchor is its drop chain — covered in the Ch12 ribs.
→ Kill the Wither or Wither Reincarnated [check]
